title: test-matrix.json
description: Consumer scenario list for fs-test-harness. The runner reads `scenarios`; everything else is free-form metadata.

_format.description: Schema version tag (free-form; the runner ignores it).

_doc.description: Human note about the matrix's intent.

status.description: Agent bookkeeping. One of `pending`, `claimed-<session>`, `passed-<session>`, `failed-<session>`, `errored-<session>`, `blocked-needs-<feature>`. The runner does not read this; the claim/update/reset scripts mutate it.

image.description: Path under harness.toml [vm.image_dir] to the test image. May be empty for scenarios that build their image at scenario-time.

mount_args.description: Substituted into the mount template's {extra}. Presence of `--rw` flips the scenario into RW mode.

mount.description: Per-scenario mount override. Most scenarios omit this and inherit harness.toml [mount].

_doc.description: Human note about this scenario's intent.

evidence_link.description: Path to the diag dir on success/failure; written by update-scenario-status.sh.

recipe.description: Ordered op invocations dispatched by name. Each step's `op` field selects a template declared in harness.toml [ops] (or a built-in like `ship-to-vm` / `ship-to-host`); remaining keys are passed through as substitution tokens.

op.description: Op name; must match a key in harness.toml [ops] or a built-in (`ship-to-vm`, `ship-to-host`).
